# DTFS — Digital Trade Facilitation System

> DTFS is Africa's AI-powered digital trade operating system, connecting SMEs to global markets with escrow-secured payments, intelligent deal matching, and automated compliance. Built by Nexus X Industries Ltd.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the DTFS platform, features, pricing, team, and FAQ.

## Optional

- [About section](/#about): DTFS mission and platform background.
- [Features](/#features): Core platform capabilities.
- [How It Works](/#how-it-works): Trade workflow timeline.
- [AI Assistant](/#ai): Multilingual voice-first AI assistant capabilities.
- [Pricing](/#pricing): Starter, Growth, and Enterprise tiers.
- [FAQ](/#faq): Common questions on plans, onboarding, and compliance.
